scripts.build: pnpm --filter @syntropic137/default-react-v18 build && pnpm --filter @syntropic137/brutalist-react-v18 build && pnpm --filter @syntropic137/design-tokens build && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @syntropic137/default-react-v18 build && pnpm --filter @syntropic137/brutalist-react-v18 build && pnpm --filter @syntropic137/design-tokens build && tsc --noEmit
